description:
Digital forensics labs are often overwhelmed by backlogs. To standardize a 'Fast Triage' process, create a reusable global Ingest Profile in Autopsy named 'Fast_Triage' that enables only the File Type Identification, Hash Lookup, and Extension Mismatch Detector modules. Create a new forensic case named 'Backlog_Triage_2024' (Case Number: INV-SOP-001) in /home/ga/Cases/ and add /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd as a data source. Run the ingest process using the 'Fast_Triage' profile. Once complete, write an administrative audit report to /home/ga/Reports/profile_audit.txt containing exactly these lines:

PROFILE_NAME: Fast_Triage
ENABLED_MODULES: File Type Identification, Hash Lookup, Extension Mismatch Detector
CASE_NAME: Backlog_Triage_2024
DATA_SOURCE: ntfs_undel.dd
INGEST_STATUS: COMPLETED
